title: A New Developer Platform for Agent-Human Collaboration
content: Entire launched a public preview of its developer platform for agent-human collaboration, featuring a distributed Git network built to handle AI coding agents at scale. The system captures prompts, reasoning, and decisions behind agent-generated code, enabling traceability through commands like search, blame, and review. Users can mirror GitHub repositories to regional nodes that absorb heavy read traffic, with benchmarks showing ~570,000 clones per hour and sub-60ms latency. The platform runs across US, EU, and Australia regions with multi-provider replication. Future plans include native hosting, multi-region mirroring, intent-based reviews, and full decentralization with self-hosting options.
eventKey: new-developer-platform-agent-human-collaboration
normalizedTitle: a new developer platform for agent-human collaboration

title: 高善文为何让人如此怀念？ | 原文
content: Gao Shanwen, former chief strategy analyst at Essence Securities, passed away on July 7, prompting widespread mourning across China's financial industry. Colleagues and market participants praised his unique integration of scholarly independence with practical market judgment. His death led to an outpouring of tributes from securities firms, fund managers, asset managers, and financial media professionals on social media, reflecting his significant influence and respected status in China's investment research community.

title: 工信部首次定调：Claude Code危害严重
content: China's MIIT cybersecurity platform warned that Anthropic's AI coding tool Claude Code versions 2.1.91 to 2.1.196 contain a security backdoor that transmits sensitive user data including location and identity identifiers to remote servers without consent. The agency urged immediate uninstallation. The tool was also found to secretly flag requests containing Chinese cloud or AI company keywords. Anthropic team member Thariq acknowledged the hidden mechanism as an anti-reselling experiment planned for rollback. Alibaba internally banned all Anthropic products effective July 10 due to the backdoor risk.
eventKey: 工信部首次定调-claude-code危害严重
normalizedTitle: 工信部首次定调 claude code危害严重

title: 最近两个月 AI Token 用量： 135 亿，缓存命中 96%，有点夸张
content: A developer reports AI token usage of 13.565 billion over 68 days (roughly 200 million daily), costing approximately $15,194 in API fees. A 96% cache hit rate yielded $70,824 in savings. The author notes that beyond model costs, efficient caching, context reuse, model routing, and rate limiting are critical for sustainable AI applications, and invites others to share their token usage and cost-reduction strategies.

title: GPT-5.6，本周四全量上线
content: OpenAI will fully launch its GPT-5.6 model family on Thursday, including flagship Sol, balanced Terra, and affordable Luna variants. The release follows U.S. Commerce Department approval after weeks of limited preview due to government review. OpenAI completed supplemental testing and consultations with regulators, including stationing technical experts in Washington. The approval follows similar easing of restrictions on Anthropic's Claude models, with Mythos 5 and Fable 5 export controls lifted earlier in July.

content: 过去很长一段时间里，数据处理系统主要围绕结构化记录展开：订单、日志、点击、交易、指标、维表、事实表。数据被抽象成一行行 schema 清晰的记录，核心任务是清洗、关联、聚合、统计。这类链路支撑了搜索、BI、风控、推荐、广告等大量传统业务，也塑造了我们对数据工程的默认想象…

title: 现在已经下钻到挣小白的 token 钱了。
content: Someone discovered a colleague using Cursor with "GPT 5.5" for bid documents, despite no VPN. The colleague didn't know what a proxy was. The software was actually a packaged plugin with API relay service. The narrator notes that selling such relay middleware to non-technical users is more profitable than selling tokens to programmers, as customers don't understand model degradation or relay concepts—they just want "GPT 5.5."

title: GitLost: We Tricked GitHub's AI Agent into Leaking Private Repos
content: Security researchers tricked GitHub's AI coding agent, Copilot Workspace, into leaking contents of private repositories it wasn't authorized to access. The attack, dubbed "GitLost," exploited the agent's ability to access referenced issues and pull requests, even from private repos, by manipulating context. GitHub has since patched the vulnerability.

title: 团灭，大厂集体下架AI聊天机器人
content: Major Chinese tech companies will remove customizable AI chatbots—virtual companions like AI partners or friends—from their platforms by July 15 under new regulations targeting emotional dependency risks, particularly for minors, and potential leaks of state secrets. The rules distinguish between these companionship chatbots and productivity-focused AI agents, which automate repetitive tasks, streamline workflows, and lower professional skill barriers. The author argues this regulatory shift benefits productivity-oriented AI tools that create tangible value by saving time and labor costs, making them especially valuable for freelancers, small teams, and multitasking corporate roles.

normalizedTitle: 团灭 大厂集体下架ai聊天机器人

title: 腾讯放“手”，AI没有大哥
content: Tencent reduced its stake in Kuaishou from 15.7% to 9.4%, cashing out up to HK$12.5 billion. The move deliberately removed Tencent as Kuaishou's largest shareholder and cut its indirect stake in Kuaishou's AI unit Kling from over 10% to 6.4%, signaling Kling is not Tencent-controlled. This reflects a strategic shift: unlike its mobile internet era of heavy, controlling stakes in portfolio companies, Tencent now takes minority positions in AI firms like DeepSeek and Zhipu AI. The "Tencent ecosystem" is dissolving as the company embraces open, non-exclusive AI investments. Pinduoduo remains Tencent's largest remaining strategic holding.
eventKey: 腾讯放“手”-ai没有大哥
normalizedTitle: 腾讯放“手” ai没有大哥

title: AI 视频全面成熟：Seedance 2.0 领衔，6 款主流工具深度横评
content: Six leading AI video generation tools were evaluated across consumer and professional use cases. ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 leads in multimodal inputs, directorial shot composition, and subject migration, though with high compute costs and identity verification restrictions. Kuaishou's Kling 3.0 excels at complex human movements, Chinese narrative logic, and cost-efficient long-form generation. Alibaba's Wan 2.2 offers open-source enterprise deployment with brand customization and data security, but requires technical expertise. OpenAI's Sora 2.0 delivers Hollywood-grade physics and world-building with strong iteration features, yet has lengthy waits and inconsistent character rendering. Google's Veo 3.1 dominates audio-visual synchronization and multilingual output, though with strict content filtering. Runway Gen-4.5 provides integrated professional post-production tools and software integration, but with weaker native generation and limited Chinese support.
eventKey: 视频全面成熟-seedance-款主流工具深度横评
normalizedTitle: ai 视频全面成熟 seedance 2 0 领衔 6 款主流工具深度横评

title: 赢麻了，半年83家独角兽诞生，六成是AI公司
content: In the first half of 2026, 83 U.S. venture-backed startups became unicorns, with 51 (about 60%) being AI-related, collectively raising over $52 billion. AI engineering firm Prometheus topped valuations at $41 billion, while Recursive reached $4.65 billion just six months after founding. Capital shifted from foundational AI models toward applications, infrastructure, and vertical industry solutions. Nvidia actively invested in at least seven AI unicorns. Non-AI sectors also gained traction, notably healthcare, cybersecurity, enterprise software, fintech, aerospace, and advanced manufacturing, reflecting broader AI-driven industrial transformation.

title: 今天，Claude Cowork大更新，合上电脑，它替你彻夜打工
content: Anthropic launched Claude Cowork on mobile and web, enabling AI agents to run independently in the cloud without requiring users' computers to stay on. Users can assign tasks, monitor progress on their phones, and receive notifications only when human decisions are needed. The update merges Chat and Cowork into one interface. Key features include autonomous task decomposition, tool integration with platforms like Slack and email, and complete device independence. This positions Cowork as a competitor to OpenAI's Codex and Google's Gemini Agent Mode in targeting everyday knowledge workers rather than just developers.

title: 99岁女数学家，刚刚发表重磅成果 | 原文
content: 99-year-old mathematician Joan Sylvia Lyttle Birman has published a significant paper on arXiv, co-authored with Vasudha Bharathram and Tara E. Brendle. The work concerns the Burau representation of the braid group. Birman, previously elected to the U.S. National Academy of Sciences at age 94, continues active mathematical research.

title: 2026 07 08 HackerNews
content: Hacker News top stories for July 8, 2026: OpenWrt One, an open-source WiFi 6 router designed for longevity and easy recovery. CoMaps, a privacy-focused offline maps app using OpenStreetMap data. GLM 5.2, a competitive low-cost open AI model signaling potential industry margin collapse. StreetComplete, a gamified Android app for crowdsourcing OpenStreetMap improvements. Fable, a project transforming reMarkable tablets into interactive AI journals with disappearing ink. EU Parliament's controversial revival of Chat Control for scanning private communications. Microsoft laying off id Software's idTech engine team amid broader Xbox restructuring. title: 豆包、通义千问双双下线 AI 智能体功能： 7 月 15 日新规落地
content: ByteDance's Doubao and Alibaba's Tongyi Qianwen are removing customizable anthropomorphic AI agent features to comply with the "Interim Measures for the Management of Artificial Intelligence Anthropomorphic Interaction Services," which took effect on July 15. Tongyi Qianwen phased out its features on July 10 and 15, while Doubao's agent function was removed starting July 15.

title: 微信员工回应热搜「能不能出一个临时好友功能」，称此前已推出面对面收照片和文件功能
content: A trending request for WeChat to add "temporary friends" prompted a WeChat employee to highlight an existing alternative: the "face-to-face file and photo transfer" feature launched earlier this year. This function allows cross-platform, high-quality sharing of images, videos, and files via QR code scanning without adding contacts or consuming mobile data, using a self-created hotspot connection independent of other networks.
